what_was_requested: ETAP 4: Integration and robustness validation - combine promoted features from stages 1-3 into single strategy, run backtest, layer compare, walk-forward, condition stability, and robustness bundle analysis
what_was_done: 1. Searched research memory and gold collection for promoted features. Found: cf_regime_vol_gate (PROMOTED, Sharpe=1.45, PnL=1644), cf_momentum_divergence (REJECTED), cf_adaptive_trailing_exit (WATCHLIST). 2. Cloned active-signal-v1 → research_integrated_v1@2. 3. Validated signal logic with cf_regime_vol_gate gate and exit logic with cf_adaptive_trailing_exit. 4. Saved version 2. 5. Ran backtest: run_id=20260407-153958-738adaee. 6. CRITICAL FINDING: The integrated run produced IDENTICAL metrics to baseline (net_pnl=1308.65, trades=498, PF=1.305, Sharpe=1.056). Layer compare (analysis-573a60ca5eae) confirms 100% trade overlap, 0 delta on ALL metrics. The save_version API did NOT persist the new entry_logic_code with cf_regime_vol_gate - the snapshot still uses original signal code. 7. Robustness bundle (analysis-3d84335e7b12): quarterly breakdown available (21 quarters), 5/6 sub-checks unavailable. Worst quarter: 2026Q1 (-$112.55, PF=0.60). Best: 2023Q4 (+$205.63, PF=4.76). 8. Walk-forward (20260407-154048-ee390760) and condition stability (cond-c3d1d7874589) jobs were started but results reflect baseline, not integrated strategy. 9. Recorded result in research project etap4-integration-validation-ae1263b2.

mcp_problems.description: save_version with signals parameter did not persist new entry_logic_code. The snapshot version 2 still contains the original signal code without cf_regime_vol_gate, despite validation passing and signals being passed in the save call.
mcp_problems.suggestion: Investigate whether signal mutation requires a different API path (e.g., separate signal update call before save_version), or if the signals payload is being silently ignored during version save.
